incidents.headline: Accidente entre dos vehículos deja una víctima fatal y un herido en Bocas del Toro
incidents.recommended_action: 📋 SCHEDULE INSPECTION — DETAIL: Bocas del Toro showing road damage indicators. Monitor for 24hrs then assess PowerPatch deployment.
incidents.sv_description: These images are taken from a second-floor balcony/porch of a traditional Caribbean-style wooden building in Bocas del Toro. The street views (Images 2, 3, and 4) show the road surface from an elevated angle, but the asphalt appears to be in relatively good condition with no visible potholes, exposed base layers, or significant damage. The road surface appears dark and uniform without the characteristic light grey/white patches that indicate pothole damage.

incidents.headline: Carretera Interamericana: travesía entre baches y huecos
incidents.recommended_action: ⚡ PRIORITY VISIT — Inspect Carretera Interamericana within 24hrs. 3/5 sources confirmed. Bring 3-5 boxes PowerPatch.
incidents.sv_description: All five images show the Carretera Interamericana highway in good condition with smooth, well-maintained asphalt surfaces. The road appears to be a modern multi-lane divided highway with metal guardrails, clear lane markings, and no visible potholes, exposed base layers, or significant surface damage. The pavement is uniformly dark with no irregular patches, crumbling edges, or debris-filled depressions visible in any direction.

incidents.headline: Panamá propone indemnizar a los afectados por los huecos y baches de sus carreteras
incidents.recommended_action: 🚨 IMMEDIATE DEPLOYMENT — PowerPatch to DETAIL:. Visual confirms moderate damage (0.4m Ø). Estimated 1 boxes needed. Contact MOP/ATTT.
incidents.sv_description: In Image 1 (Norte), there is visible road damage in the center-left portion of the frame near the parked vehicles. The asphalt shows irregular patches with color contrast between darker asphalt and lighter exposed areas, indicating deterioration of the road surface. The damage appears as multiple small defects with edge crumbling visible along the lane where vehicles are parked.

incidents.headline: Carretera Interamericana: puntos críticos con baches
incidents.recommended_action: 📋 SCHEDULE INSPECTION — Carretera Interamericana showing road damage indicators. Monitor for 24hrs then assess PowerPatch deployment.
incidents.sv_description: After examining all 5 images carefully, no potholes or road damage are visible on the Carretera Interamericana. The road surface appears to be in good condition with intact dark asphalt, clear lane markings, and no visible exposed base layers, irregular depressions, or crumbling edges. The highway shows a well-maintained multi-lane divided road with metal guardrails separating traffic directions.

incidents.headline: Peligroso hueco en la Tumba Muerto
incidents.recommended_action: 🚨 IMMEDIATE DEPLOYMENT — PowerPatch to Vía Ricardo J. Alfaro (Tumba Muerto). Visual confirms moderate damage (0.4m Ø). Estimated 1 boxes needed. Contact MOP/ATTT.
incidents.sv_description: In Image 4 (Oeste), visible road surface deterioration is present near the pedestrian crossing area, showing irregular patches with exposed lighter base material contrasting against the darker asphalt. The area near the crosswalk and the curved road section shows multiple signs of surface degradation with crumbling edges and color contrast indicating subsurface exposure. This damage pattern at a high-traffic intersection on Tumba Muerto is consistent with conditions that could cause vehicle accidents as reported.

incidents.headline: El Picadillo del 21 de abril de 2026
incidents.location: Avenida Nacional, semáforo hacia San Miguel
incidents.recommended_action: 🚨 IMMEDIATE DEPLOYMENT — PowerPatch to Avenida Nacional, semáforo hacia San Miguel. Visual confirms moderate damage (0.6m Ø). Estimated 1 boxes needed. Contact MOP/ATTT.
incidents.sv_description: In image 4 (Oeste), there is visible road surface deterioration with exposed base layer material showing as lighter grey/beige patches contrasting against the darker asphalt surface near the intersection. The road surface shows significant wear with irregular patches and edge crumbling visible along the curb area and roadway. Image 3 (Sur) also shows deteriorated pavement conditions with uneven surfaces and potential depressions near the corner where vehicles are parked.
